title: Writing: Shopping & Colors
description: Construct sentences describing what you want to buy using numbers and colors in Hindi.

blocks.title: Translate to Hindi (Romaji)
blocks.instruction: Write these sentences in Romaji (or Devanagari if you can!):

blocks.prompt:
Write a short shopping scenario in Romaji. 
1. Say 'Namaste' to the shopkeeper.
2. Ask how much a specific color item is (e.g., 'How much is the red book?').
3. Say 'I want this' or 'Give me this'.
4. Say 'Thank you'.
blocks.sampleAnswer:
Namaste! Yah laal kitaab kitna hai? Yeh tees rupaye hai. Theek hai, mujhe yah chahiye. Dhanyavaad!

(Hello! How much is this red book? This is 30 rupees. Okay, I want this. Thank you!)
